title: Municipal Zoning Ordinance 12.4
excerpt: Home occupation businesses may be conditionally permitted in low-density districts with parking and signage limits.

title: Local Fire and Safety Code 8.2
excerpt: Commercial food preparation requires ventilation review and fire suppression verification before permit issuance.

title: Industrial and Employment Use Code 4.1
excerpt: Light manufacturing and high-impact kitchen equipment require special review in industrial and employment districts.
